unitTitle.en: 3.1 Matrix addition, subtraction, and scalar multiplication
unitTitle.zh-hk: 3.1 矩陣加法、減法與純量乘法

sourceBoundary.en: This storyboard uses MATH1030-Notes.pdf pp. 35-38 as the direct source for matrix equality, matrix addition, scalar multiplication, zero matrices, additive inverses, subtraction as A + (-B), and the entrywise proof style for algebraic laws. It also uses Practice Set 2 questions 1-2 for entrywise scalar/addition practice and defined/not-defined size checks. It does not introduce matrix multiplication rules except to contrast that addition and scalar multiplication are entrywise.
sourceBoundary.zh-hk: 此 storyboard 以 MATH1030-Notes.pdf pp. 35-38 為直接來源，涵蓋矩陣相等、矩陣加法、純量乘法、零矩陣、加法逆元、把減法定義為 A + (-B)，以及用逐項比較證明代數規律的方式。Practice Set 2 第 1-2 題支持逐項數乘/加法練習和有定義/無定義的大小檢查。不引入矩陣乘法規則，只用來對比加法與純量乘法是逐格運算。
sourceBoundary.zh-cn: 此 storyboard 以 MATH1030-Notes.pdf pp. 35-38 为直接来源，涵盖矩阵相等、矩阵加法、数乘、零矩阵、加法逆元、把减法定义为 A + (-B)，以及用逐项比较证明代数规律的方式。Practice Set 2 第 1-2 题支持逐项数乘/加法练习和有定义/无定义的大小检查。不引入矩阵乘法规则，只用来对比加法与数乘是逐格运算。

segments.goal: Show that A + B is defined only when every position in A has a matching position in B.
beats: Display two 2 by 3 matrices as compatible.
Display a 2 by 3 matrix next to a 2 by 2 matrix as incompatible.
Keep the phrase corresponding entries on screen.
mathBlocks: A, B in R^{m x n}
A + B is m x n
segments.animation: matching grid positions light up, then a missing third-column partner blocks the operation

segments.goal: Use the source example to compute representative entries and then reveal the full sum.
beats: Highlight the top-left entries 2 and 6.
Show 2 + 6 = 8.
Reveal the full 2 by 3 sum.
segments.animation: corresponding cells move into one result cell

segments.goal: Show scalar multiplication as a shape-preserving operation on every entry.
beats: Place the scalar 7 beside the sample matrix.
Highlight one positive and one negative entry.
Reveal the scaled matrix while keeping the 2 by 3 outline.
segments.animation: one scalar badge fans out to every matrix cell

segments.goal: Connect subtraction to the definition A - B = A + (-B).
beats: Negate every entry of B to build -B.
Replace A - B with A + (-B).
Label subtraction as not a separate shape rule.
segments.animation: B flips signs, then joins A through addition

segments.cardTitle: Zero and inverse explain the additive structure
segments.goal: Show the zero matrix and additive inverse as same-size objects.
beats: Display A + O = A.
Display A + (-A) = O.
Emphasize that O has the same size as A.
segments.animation: identity and cancellation badges lock to the same matrix outline

segments.cardTitle: The algebraic laws are entrywise proofs
segments.goal: Bridge the definitions to the theorem that addition and scalar multiplication obey familiar algebraic laws.
beats: Show a few theorem identities as cards.
Point to the (i,j)-entry test for proving equality.
Send the reader to the interactive arithmetic lab.
segments.animation: identity cards sit above one highlighted generic cell

segments.goal: 說明只有當 A 的每個位置都能在 B 中找到對應位置時，A + B 才有定義。
beats: 把兩個 2 by 3 矩陣顯示為大小相容。
把 2 by 3 與 2 by 2 矩陣顯示為大小不相容。
保留「對應位置」這個關鍵詞。
mathBlocks: A, B in R^{m x n}
A + B 是 m x n
segments.animation: 對應格逐一亮起，然後第三列缺少配對位置時阻止運算

segments.goal: 用來源例子計算代表性元素，再顯示完整和矩陣。
beats: 突出左上角元素 2 和 6。
顯示完整 2 by 3 和矩陣。
segments.animation: 兩個對應格合成一個結果格

segments.goal: 把純量乘法展示成保持形狀、逐項縮放的運算。
beats: 把純量 7 放在範例矩陣旁邊。
突出一個正元素和一個負元素。
顯示數乘後矩陣，同時保持 2 by 3 外形。
segments.animation: 一個純量標籤散射到所有矩陣格

segments.goal: 把減法連到定義 A - B = A + (-B)。
beats: 把 B 的每個元素變號得到 -B。
把 A - B 改寫成 A + (-B)。
標示減法不是另一套大小規則。
segments.animation: B 變號後，透過加法與 A 合併

segments.cardTitle: 零矩陣與逆元揭示加法結構
segments.goal: 把零矩陣與加法逆元顯示成同型對象。
beats: 顯示 A + O = A。
顯示 A + (-A) = O。
強調 O 與 A 大小相同。
segments.animation: 單位元與抵消標籤鎖在同一矩陣外形上

segments.goal: 把定義連到加法與純量乘法滿足的熟悉代數規律。
beats: 顯示幾張定理恒等式卡片。
指向 (i,j)-元素檢查作為證明矩陣相等的方法。
把讀者帶到互動算術 lab。
segments.animation: 恒等式卡片位於一個被標出的通用格上方

segments.goal: 说明只有当 A 的每个位置都能在 B 中找到对应位置时，A + B 才有定义。
beats: 把两个 2 by 3 矩阵显示为大小相容。
把 2 by 3 与 2 by 2 矩阵显示为大小不相容。
保留“对应位置”这个关键词。
mathBlocks: A, B in R^{m x n}
A + B 是 m x n
segments.animation: 对应格逐一亮起，然后第三列缺少配对位置时阻止运算

segments.goal: 用来源例子计算代表性元素，再显示完整和矩阵。
beats: 突出左上角元素 2 和 6。
显示完整 2 by 3 和矩阵。
segments.animation: 两个对应格合成一个结果格

segments.goal: 把数乘展示成保持形状、逐项缩放的运算。
beats: 把标量 7 放在示例矩阵旁边。
突出一个正元素和一个负元素。
显示数乘后矩阵，同时保持 2 by 3 外形。
segments.animation: 一个标量标签散射到所有矩阵格

segments.goal: 把减法连到定义 A - B = A + (-B)。
beats: 把 B 的每个元素变号得到 -B。
把 A - B 改写成 A + (-B)。
标示减法不是另一套大小规则。
segments.animation: B 变号后，通过加法与 A 合并

segments.cardTitle: 零矩阵与逆元揭示加法结构
segments.goal: 把零矩阵与加法逆元显示成同型对象。
beats: 显示 A + O = A。
显示 A + (-A) = O。
强调 O 与 A 大小相同。
segments.animation: 单位元与抵消标签锁在同一矩阵外形上

segments.goal: 把定义连到加法与数乘满足的熟悉代数规律。
beats: 显示几张定理恒等式卡片。
指向 (i,j)-元素检查作为证明矩阵相等的方法。
把读者带到互动算术 lab。
segments.animation: 恒等式卡片位于一个被标出的通用格上方
